zh.ofBrockholesHall, Preston, Lancashire, E: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Brockholes於大約1335年出生在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓時，他的父親Adam de Brockholes25歲，母親Mrs. Adam Brockholes - Brochol20歲。他於大約1360年與Margaret在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1402年之後。

zh-hans.ofBrockholesHall, Preston, Lancashire, E: 英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas de Brockholes于大约1335年出生在英国藍卡爾普雷斯頓时，他的父亲Adam de Brockholes25岁，母亲Mrs. Adam Brockholes - Brochol20岁。他于大约1360年与Margaret在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1402年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Brockholes was born about 1335, in Preston, Lancashire, England, his father, Adam de Brockholes, was 25 and his mother, Mrs. Adam Brockholes - Brochol, was 20. He married Margaret about 1360, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1402.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Brockholes est né environ 1335, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Brockholes, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Adam Brockholes - Brochol, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret environ 1360, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1402.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Brockholes um 1335 in Preston, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de Brockholes 25 und seine Mutter Mrs. Adam Brockholes - Brochol 20. Er hat um 1360 in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Margaret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1402.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Brockholes è nato il circa 1335 nel Preston, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Adam de Brockholes, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Adam Brockholes - Brochol, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret circa 1360, nel Preston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1402.

ja.ofBrockholesHall, Preston, Lancashire, E: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストン
ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Brockholesが約1335年にイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンで生まれた時，父Adam de Brockholesは25歳，母Mrs. Adam Brockholes - Brocholは20歳であった。約1360年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンでMargaretと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1402年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Brockholes(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Brockholes(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Adam Brockholes - Brochol(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1402년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Brockholes nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Brockholes, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Adam Brockholes - Brochol, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret aproximadamente 1360, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1402.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Brockholes родился около 1335 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam de Brockholes было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Adam Brockholes - Brochol, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret около 1360 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1402 г.
